**Root cause of the March 25 crashes (actual EXIT_STATUS=1 crashes):**

The 3 true crashes on **March 25 at 17:54-17:55 UTC** were caused by an `uncaughtException` handler at line 33-37 of `index.ts` that calls `process.exit(1)`. When a congress debate triggered an Anthropic API 400 error (`invalid_request_error`), the error propagated as an uncaught exception (not a rejected promise) and the explicit `process.exit(1)` in the handler...(truncated)
